preferred_skills: Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors (RICS) Accreditation
responsibilities: Prepare detailed bills of quantities and cost estimates from architectural and engineering drawings for tender purposes
Conduct quantity take-offs using CostX and BIM models to ensure accurate measurement of construction materials and labor
Evaluate contractor tenders and bids to recommend the most cost-effective and technically compliant procurement option
Administer construction contracts including valuation of works, interim payment certificates, and final account settlement
Assess and negotiate variations and change orders to ensure accurate cost tracking throughout the project lifecycle
Develop cost plans and budget forecasts at each project stage to support client decision-making and financial control
Conduct risk and contingency analysis to identify potential cost overruns and recommend mitigation strategies
Liaise with architects, engineers, and contractors to resolve cost-related queries and ensure value engineering opportunities are captured
